name: hipfire-autoheal
description: Triage and fix hipfire runtime issues: daemon hangs, kernel JIT failures, port conflicts, multi-turn recall breaks, VRAM OOM. Walks the standard fix catalog in order of likelihood, gathers diagnostics, and ships targeted repairs. Framework-agnostic — works with any AI agent that can read, run shell commands, and edit config.

requires.gpu: AMD RDNA/CDNA supported by the current checkout
